aeo_readiness.summary: The website lacks essential AEO elements such as structured data, comprehensive content, and customer reviews, which are crucial for search engine optimization.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to provide search engines with structured data about the business.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on Google and other platforms to build credibility.
Optimize meta tags and headings with relevant keywords to improve search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business has partial Google Business Profile (GBP) elements present, but it is not optimized or verified.
critical_issues: The business lacks a verified GBP listing.
No customer reviews are present on Google.
Incomplete or inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information across the web.

nap_citations.summary: The business has some NAP citations, but they are likely inconsistent or incomplete.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online platforms to ensure consistency.
List the business on relevant local directories and citation sites.
Monitor and manage online citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search and voice search due to missing schema and GBP optimization
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement schema markup and encourage customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establish the business as a local authority by actively managing GBP and local citations
